prose: Fukui reactivity indices computed on nitrobenzene using DFT at B3LYP/def2-TZVP (tier standard, density-fit in PySCF), gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Input geometry from provided .xyz file; single-point calculation. Mulliken partial charges used for condensed Fukui index calculation. Most electrophilic site: atom 4 (C, ortho to NO₂) with f⁺ = 0.496. Most nucleophilic site: atom 5 (C, meta to NO₂) with f⁻ = 0.107. All SCF states converged; charge-conservation checks passed. Full Fukui indices (f⁺, f⁻, f⁰, dual descriptor) reported atom-by-atom in the table above. Visualization (Fukui-index plot) generated and available at the path specified. Integrity status: ok/trustworthy.
